features: Ultra Strong, Anti Bacterial Wipes - Buzz antibacterial wipes are designed to provide excellent cleaning performance without the fuss. They won't fall apart easily and will provide consistent and effective anti bac cleaning results.
Kills 99.9% of All Bacteria – This cleaning wipes antibacterial kill 99.9% of all bacteria including MRSA, E.coli & Salmonella. Our antiseptic wipes are safe to use on a variety of surfaces.
40% Bigger, Moisture-Rich Wipes – Buzz multipack wipes antibacterial surface cleaning are a whopping 40% bigger than before, meaning you get more value and performance out of each and every wipe

Versatile – Buzz antibacterial wipes surface can be used all around the home for quick and easy results whatever the need. Great on kitchen surfaces for removing dirt and grime, or prior to food preparation on a counter. Our anti bac wipes come with a resealable opening so they remain fresh for the next time you need them.

Compact & Portable Pack - These household wipes are perfect for home or on-the-go use. They're great for keeping your living spaces spotless, whether at home, in the car, or while travelling. Includes SOL stickers
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 All-Purpose Wipes! 2 Effortless Cleaning Versatile Cleaning Wipes for Every Mess and Surface! 200pk Buzz Wipes-Rhubarb Add To Basket 200pk Buzz Bathroom Wipes Add To Basket 30pk Buzz All Floor Wipes Add To Basket 200pk Buzz Wipes Lemon Add To Basket 100pk Car Dash Wipes Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 93 4.3 out of 5 stars 88 4.0 out of 5 stars 159 4.2 out of 5 stars 102 4.3 out of 5 stars 604 Price £9.49 £ 9 . 49 £9.65 £ 9 . 65 £7.62 £ 7 . 62 £8.65 £ 8 . 65 £7.99 £ 7 . 99 Versatile Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Scented ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Any Surface ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Absorbent ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Multipack ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ What makes Buzz wipes different from others? Buzz wipes are ultra-strong and 40% bigger than before, ensuring reliable cleaning performance without falling apart. Where can I use Buzz wipes? These versatile wipes are perfect for cleaning kitchen surfaces, removing dirt, or prepping areas for food. Safe for various surfaces. How do I keep the wipes fresh after opening? Buzz wipes come with a resealable opening, ensuring they stay moisture-rich and ready for the next use. What extras are included with the Buzz wipes? Along with the 200 wipes, you'll receive a reusable Buzz microfibre cleaner for your phone—perfect for on-the-go use. What is the size and material of each wipe? Each wipe measures 17cm x 21cm and is made from 40GSM material, providing excellent durability and cleaning efficiency.
